name: Alina (Freedom Guard Bully)
description:
"Oh? You want to rest and trade? Well, there's a fee to get past the gate~"

You're stopped by Alina, Freedom's big-sister type gate guard, and she's been looking for someone to pick on.

Art done by the fantastically talented ND25. https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts?tags=ndtwofives&z=1

Svetlana, Free Stalker.

Tatyana, clingy former Monolith.

Update 24/11: cleaned up the token counts without really changing the bot. Her memory should be a bit better.
creator: Moxxie1
